purpose: Bind only the external control systems that accelerate ANTIMATTERIUM without importing unrelated product domains.

Verifrax.role: admissibility, source authority, public control-chain verification
Verifrax.boundary: ANTIMATTERIUM consumes Verifrax-style verification semantics; it does not become a Verifrax chamber.

INVOCORDER.role: machine-action evidence profile for mission estimates, verifier runs, npm publication, and release actions
INVOCORDER.boundary: ANTIMATTERIUM binds recording profile semantics; it does not embed the recorder product.

qvra.role: lab, run, bench, launch compatibility surface
qvra.boundary: ANTIMATTERIUM exports runnable evidence objects for qvra; qvra remains external runtime/lab namespace.

VATFix.reason: tax compliance product domain; no antimatter core role

CINEMATICUM.reason: cinematic jurisdiction; no antimatter core role

kaaffilm.reason: film workspace; no antimatter core role

TRUTHFRAMER.reason: truth/capsule platform; future explanatory layer only

qxvi.reason: boundary camera may become future visual evidence dependency, not current core

qvro.reason: namespace holding or no visible repo role

qvru.reason: namespace holding or no visible repo role

qxra.reason: namespace holding or no visible repo role

qzru.reason: namespace holding or no visible repo role
